stories.title: Documentation accuracy
stories.description: Verify that documentation matches the current implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm README describes the actual CLI interface and usage
Confirm any architecture docs match the current source tree
Confirm no references to deleted or renamed files
Confirm help text is sufficient for a new user to get started

stories.title: Test health
stories.description: Verify the test suite is healthy and covers critical paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm all tests pass
Confirm coverage thresholds are met (if configured)
Confirm no skipped or pending tests
Confirm tests import only functions that actually exist in source modules

stories.title: Logic and error handling
stories.description: Verify that core logic is correct and error paths behave reasonably.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm catch blocks either rethrow, log, or return a documented fallback
Confirm no silently swallowed errors
Confirm edge cases (empty input, missing files, invalid config) don't crash

stories.title: CLI/API usability
stories.description: Verify the interface is usable by humans and agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm error messages include the next action the user should take
Confirm help text explains all commands and options
Confirm exit codes are meaningful and documented

stories.title: Publish/deploy readiness
stories.description: Verify the project is ready to ship.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm build succeeds with no errors or warnings
Confirm type check passes
Confirm package metadata is complete (name, version, license, etc.)
Confirm no dev artifacts or secrets are included in the published package

stories.title: Architectural coherence
stories.description: Verify the codebase is internally consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm abstractions are used consistently (no mixed patterns for the same concern)
Confirm no dead code (unused exports, unreachable branches)
Confirm no TODO/FIXME/HACK comments that indicate unfinished work

stories.title: Security boundaries
stories.description: Verify existing security boundaries are correct. Do not add new security mechanisms.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirm user input is validated at system boundaries
Confirm file operations don't allow path traversal outside the project
Confirm no secrets or credentials are logged or stored in plain text
